# STRAT.042 ? Six Thinking Hats (de Bono)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** decision_making_frameworks
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
White (facts), Red (emotions), Black (caution), Yellow (optimism), Green (creativity), Blue (process); parallel thinking; role clarity

## Application
Use hats sequentially; everyone same hat simultaneously; explore perspectives systematically; separate thinking modes; structured exploration

## Key Values
- Parallel thinking
- Perspective diversity
- Systematic exploration
- Role clarity
- Comprehensive view

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, decision_making_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
